_description: Complete summary of all data-fetching code in the evaluaciones module for the PANORAMA dashboard
_panoramaPageStatus: The /panorama/page.tsx currently just REDIRECTS to /{organizationSlug}/ — it has NO dashboard. All dashboard data lives in the evaluaciones module at /evaluaciones?tab=dashboard and /evaluaciones?tab=progress

fetchHumanRiskDashboardData.description: Main dashboard query. Fetches HumanRiskProfiles, completed SimulationRuns, and total run count in parallel. Computes all aggregations server-side.

prismaQueries.selects: overallScore, alignment, riskLevel, criterio, duration, completedAt, errorPatterns, scenario.template.processDefinitionId, scenario.template.title

prismaQueries.description: Total runs (all statuses) for completion rate calc

returnType.orgAvgScore: number — average of all HumanRiskProfile.overallScore values (0-100)
returnType.completionRate: number — percentage (0-100) of completed vs total runs
returnType.avgDurationMinutes: number — average run duration in minutes
returnType.scoreTrend: Array<{ month: string (e.g. 'Ene 2025'), score: number }> — monthly avg overallScore
returnType.errorPatterns: Array<{ pattern: string, count: number }> — top 10 most frequent error patterns
returnType.profiles: Array<ProfileItem> — all user profiles with scores, strengths, risk areas

fetchProgressData.description: Before/after progress comparison. Splits completed runs into first-half vs second-half to show improvement over time.

prismaQueries.selects: userId, overallScore, alignment, riskLevel, criterio, completedAt, scenario.template.processDefinitionId, scenario.template.title, user.name, user.email, user.image

returnType.overallFirst: PeriodScores — {overall, alignment, riskLevel, criterio, count} for first half of runs
returnType.processProgress: Array<ProcessProgress> — per-process first/latest comparison, sorted by delta desc
returnType.memberProgress: Array<MemberProgress> — per-member first/latest score comparison, sorted by delta desc
returnType.dimensionTrends: Array<DimensionTrend> — { month, alignment, riskLevel, criterio } monthly averages

evaluacionesPageQueries.description: Server component that fetches catalog data AND calls both dashboard functions

fields.dimensionAverages: { alignment: number, riskLevel: number, criterio: number }

fields.user: { name: string | null, email: string, image: string | null }

exports.scoreColor: (score: number | null) => string — Tailwind text color class (>=80 emerald, >=60 amber, <60 red)
exports.scoreBg: (score: number | null) => string — Tailwind bg class
exports.scoreStroke: (score: number | null) => string — hex color for SVG strokes
exports.riskLevelColor: (riskLevel: number | null) => string — INVERTED: <=30 green, <=60 amber, >60 red
exports.riskLevelBg: (riskLevel: number | null) => string — INVERTED bg class

HumanRiskDashboard.renders: HeroScoreCard, KpiRow, ScoreDistributionChart, ScoreTrendChart, ProcessHeatmap, ErrorPatternsCard, TeamTable
HumanRiskDashboard.emptyState: Shows EmptyState when data.insufficientData is true

ProgressDashboard.emptyState: Shows EmptyState when data.insufficientData is true

HeroScoreCard.description: Large circular gauge showing org average score (0-100) with color-coded SVG ring

KpiRow.props: { totalSimulations: number, membersEvaluated: number, completionRate: number, avgDurationMinutes: number }

ScoreDistributionChart.props: { dimensionAverages: { alignment: number, riskLevel: number, criterio: number } }
ScoreDistributionChart.description: Horizontal bar chart of 3 dimensions. Note: riskLevel is INVERTED to show as 'Control Level' (100 - riskLevel)

ScoreTrendChart.props: { scoreTrend: Array<{ month: string, score: number }> }
ScoreTrendChart.description: Area chart showing score trend over months. Needs >= 2 data points. Reference lines at 80 (green) and 60 (amber)

ProcessHeatmap.description: Table showing per-process scores across 3 dimensions with color-coded cells. Mobile: card layout. Desktop: table.

ErrorPatternsCard.props: { errorPatterns: Array<{ pattern: string, count: number }> }
ErrorPatternsCard.description: List of top error patterns with frequency badges

TeamTable.description: Table of team members with avatar, score, simulation count, strength/risk area tags, last updated date

DimensionTrendChart.description: Multi-line chart showing alignment, riskLevel, criterio trends by month

tabSystem.routing: URL param ?tab=dashboard or ?tab=progress, default is catalog

keyFields.overallScore: Int? — weighted aggregate across all simulations
keyFields.patternsByProcess: Json? — Array<{ processId, processName, avgAlignment, avgRiskLevel, dominantErrorPattern, simulationCount }>

howToUsForPanorama.step3: DashboardData provides: orgAvgScore, totalSimulations, membersEvaluated, completionRate, avgDurationMinutes, dimensionAverages, scoreTrend, processHeatmap, errorPatterns, profiles
howToUsForPanorama.step4: ProgressData provides: overallFirst/Latest comparison, processProgress, memberProgress, dimensionTrends
howToUsForPanorama.step5: Existing components can be reused: HeroScoreCard, KpiRow, ScoreDistributionChart, ScoreTrendChart, ProcessHeatmap, ErrorPatternsCard, TeamTable, DimensionTrendChart
howToUsForPanorama.step6: All score thresholds: >=80 green/good, >=60 amber/medium, <60 red/bad. For riskLevel: INVERTED (<=30 good, <=60 medium, >60 bad)
